payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Black/dark-brown leather three-seat couch with tufted back cushions and pronounced seat creases; front-right and right armrest visible while left side is edge-cropped and partially cut off, surface appears slightly shiny/worn — approximately 1.2 m from camera.
